articles.title: Carrot extract can make fake ghee dodge quality test: study
articles.description: Researchers from IIT (Banaras Hindu University) have demonstrated that carrot pigment can be added to pig fat or palm oil to mimic the Raman spectral signature to authenticate cow ghee
